name: Il Sole 24 ORE S.p.A.
summary: Il Sole 24 ORE S.p.A. operates as a multimedia publishing company in the economic, financial, professional, and cultural information sectors in Italy. The company publishes various daily newspapers and magazines. It also operates Radio 24, a news and talk radio station; ilsole24ore.com, which provides digital content for investors and professionals; Shopping24.it, an e-commerce channel that sells books, software, databanks, training courses, and specialized magazines; and Radiocor, a press agency. In addition, the company offers editorial products and services covering the areas of professionals, tax, employment, law, public administration, and technicians. Further, it provides databanks, online services, and training programs; plans and organizes conferences, road shows, and events; publishes exhibition catalogues and illustrated books on art, photography, architecture, design, and fashion; and organizes exhibitions. Additionally, the company operates 24 ORE System, an advertising agency. Il Sole 24 ORE S.p.A. was founded in 1865 and is headquartered in Milan, Italy.
